name: ABS wheel speed sensor harness chafe
primary_cause: Possible damage or chafing of the ABS wheel speed sensor wiring harness.

name: IPMA camera-to-module connection fault
primary_cause: Possible connection problem between the IPMA camera and the IPMA control module.

name: Coolant intrusion into cylinder bore
primary_cause: Possible coolant intrusion into a cylinder bore, which may cause misfires and overheating.

name: Reductant harness water intrusion
primary_cause: Possible water intrusion into the reductant system wiring harness connectors.

name: Front axle disconnect actuator/intermediate shaft fault
primary_cause: Possible fault in the front axle disconnect actuator or intermediate shaft.

name: WIF sensor connector C3080 water intrusion
primary_cause: Possible water intrusion into connector C3080 at the water-in-fuel sensor.

name: Connector C1050 water intrusion
primary_cause: Possible water intrusion into connector C1050, which may trigger multiple communication and sensor faults.

name: NOx sensor module and harness moisture/corrosion
primary_cause: Possible moisture or corrosion in the NOx sensor module or its wiring harness.

name: Engine compartment water entry over powertrain components
primary_cause: Possible water entry into the engine compartment over powertrain components.

name: Low 12V battery state of charge multi-DTC pattern
primary_cause: Low 12V battery state of charge, which may cause multiple seemingly unrelated diagnostic trouble codes.

name: Battery junction box water intrusion pattern
primary_cause: Possible water or moisture intrusion into the battery junction box.

name: Multi-cylinder misfire pattern
primary_cause: Multiple cylinder misfire detected across several cylinders.

name: Timing chain / cam-crank correlation pattern
primary_cause: Possible timing chain slack or camshaft/crankshaft correlation problem.

name: EVAP leak / purge fault pattern
primary_cause: Possible EVAP system leak or purge flow problem.

name: EVAP dust intrusion / vent blockage pattern
primary_cause: Possible dust contamination in the EVAP system, canister, or vent solenoid.

name: Lean mixture / vacuum leak pattern
primary_cause: Possible unmetered air intake or leak in the intake/vacuum system.

name: Catalyst efficiency pattern
primary_cause: Reduced catalytic converter efficiency or a catalyst monitor related problem.

name: Turbo underboost / boost leak pattern
primary_cause: Possible boost pressure problem, charge air leak, or turbo control issue.

name: High-speed CAN communication fault pattern
primary_cause: Possible communication problem between control modules, connectors, or the data bus.

name: NOx / SCR aftertreatment pattern
primary_cause: Possible NOx sensor problem or SCR catalyst efficiency problem.
